name: LiveKit Agents
description: Builds production realtime voice and video AI agents with WebRTC transport, turn detection, and STT/LLM/TTS pipelines. Python and Node framework by LiveKit.

skills.name: Realtime Voice Agents
skills.description: Builds production voice and video agents that stream over WebRTC with low latency.

skills.name: Turn Detection
skills.description: Detects conversational turns and end-of-speech so agents respond at the right moment.

skills.name: WebRTC Transport
skills.description: Handles scalable WebRTC media transport for connecting agents to users across devices.
